Key Ingredients: Ground beef, Bun, Lettuce, Tomato, Cheddar cheese, Ketchup, Mustard, Onion, Pickle, Salt, Black pepper
Cooking Steps: 1. Season ground beef with salt and pepper, form into patties. 2. Grill or pan-fry patties 3-4 min per side. 3. Add cheese in last minute. 4. Toast buns. 5. Layer lettuce, tomato, onion, pickle on bun. 6. Add patty and condiments. Serve.

Key Ingredients: Elbow macaroni, Butter, Flour, Milk, Cheddar cheese, Salt, Black pepper, Nutmeg
Cooking Steps: 1. Cook macaroni until al dente; drain. 2. Melt butter in saucepan, whisk in flour (2 min). 3. Gradually add milk, stir until thickened. 4. Add cheese, stir until melted. 5. Season with salt, pepper, nutmeg. 6. Toss with pasta. Serve hot.

Key Ingredients: Pork ribs, BBQ sauce, Garlic powder, Onion powder, Paprika, Brown sugar, Salt, Black pepper
Cooking Steps: 1. Mix dry rub (garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, brown sugar, salt, pepper). 2. Coat ribs generously with rub. 3. Wrap in foil, bake at 150°C for 3 hrs. 4. Unwrap, brush with BBQ sauce. 5. Grill or broil 5-10 min until caramelized. Serve.

Key Ingredients: Clams, Bacon, Potato, Onion, Celery, Butter, Flour, Heavy cream, Salt, Thyme, Bay leaf
Cooking Steps: 1. Cook bacon until crisp; set aside. 2. Sauté onion and celery in butter. 3. Add flour, stir 1 min. 4. Add clam juice and potato; simmer until soft. 5. Add clams and cream; heat gently. 6. Season with salt and thyme. 7. Top with bacon. Serve with bread.

Key Ingredients: Apple, Flour, Butter, Sugar, Cinnamon, Lemon juice, Salt, Egg, Cold water
Cooking Steps: 1. Make crust: mix flour, salt, butter; add cold water; form dough, chill. 2. Peel and slice apples, toss with sugar, cinnamon, lemon juice. 3. Roll out half dough, fit into pie dish. 4. Fill with apple mixture. 5. Cover with second crust, crimp edges, cut vents. 6. Brush with egg wash. 7. Bake 200°C for 45-50 min until golden.

Key Ingredients: Cooked rice (day-old), Egg, Dried shrimp, Kecap manis, Garlic, Shallot, Chili, Shrimp paste, Green onion, Salt
Cooking Steps: 1. Blend shallot, garlic, chili, shrimp paste into paste. 2. Fry paste in oil 2 min. 3. Add dried shrimp; fry 1 min. 4. Add cold rice; stir-fry on high heat. 5. Add kecap manis; toss well. 6. Season with salt. 7. Push rice aside, fry egg sunny-side up. 8. Top rice with egg and green onion. Serve.

Key Ingredients: Beef, Coconut milk, Lemongrass, Shallot, Garlic, Turmeric, Chili, Galangal, Desiccated coconut, Salt
Cooking Steps: 1. Blend shallot, garlic, chili, galangal, turmeric into paste. 2. Fry paste with lemongrass until fragrant. 3. Add beef; coat with paste. 4. Add coconut milk; bring to boil. 5. Simmer on low heat 2-3 hrs, stirring occasionally, until liquid evaporates and beef is dark and tender. 6. Add toasted coconut. Season with salt. Serve with rice.

Key Ingredients: Chicken, Peanut butter, Coconut milk, Kecap manis, Turmeric, Cumin, Lime juice, Chili, Salt
Cooking Steps: 1. Mix turmeric, cumin, kecap manis, lime juice, salt for marinade. 2. Cube chicken; marinate 1+ hr. 3. Thread onto skewers. 4. Grill on high heat 3-4 min per side. 5. Make peanut sauce: mix peanut butter, coconut milk, chili, lime juice; heat until smooth. 6. Serve skewers with peanut sauce.

Key Ingredients: Tofu, Hard-boiled egg, Potato, Bean sprout, Long beans, Peanut sauce, Coconut milk, Shrimp crackers, Cucumber, Lime
Cooking Steps: 1. Boil potato until tender; slice. 2. Blanch long beans and bean sprouts (2 min); drain. 3. Fry or bake tofu until golden. 4. Arrange all vegetables, tofu, and sliced egg on plate. 5. Make peanut sauce: blend peanuts, chili, garlic, lime, coconut milk; heat. 6. Pour sauce over salad. 7. Top with shrimp crackers. Serve.

Key Ingredients: Chicken, Rice vermicelli, Lemongrass, Turmeric, Galangal, Garlic, Shallot, Bean sprout, Hard-boiled egg, Salt, Fried shallots
Cooking Steps: 1. Boil chicken in water with lemongrass, galangal until cooked (30 min). 2. Remove chicken; shred meat. 3. Blend shallot, garlic, turmeric into paste; fry until fragrant. 4. Add to broth; simmer 15 min. Season with salt. 5. Soak vermicelli; drain. 6. Blanch bean sprouts. 7. Serve broth over noodles, topped with chicken, egg, bean sprouts and fried shallots.

Key Ingredients: Chicken, Butter, Tomato, Heavy cream, Yogurt, Garam masala, Chili powder, Turmeric, Garlic, Ginger, Cumin, Salt
Cooking Steps: 1. Marinate chicken in yogurt, garam masala, chili powder, turmeric, garlic, ginger (overnight). 2. Grill or bake chicken until charred; set aside. 3. Fry onion, garlic, ginger in butter. 4. Add tomatoes; cook until soft. 5. Blend sauce until smooth; return to pan. 6. Add cream, butter, garam masala; simmer 10 min. 7. Add chicken; simmer 10 min. Serve with naan.

Key Ingredients: Red lentils, Onion, Tomato, Garlic, Ginger, Turmeric, Garam masala, Cumin, Coriander leaves, Salt, Butter
Cooking Steps: 1. Rinse lentils; cook in water with turmeric until soft (20 min). 2. Heat butter; fry cumin seeds. 3. Add onion; cook until golden. 4. Add garlic, ginger; fry 2 min. 5. Add tomatoes; cook until soft. 6. Add to lentils with garam masala; simmer 10 min. 7. Season with salt. 8. Top with fresh coriander. Serve with rice or naan.

Key Ingredients: Basmati rice, Chicken, Yogurt, Onion, Garam masala, Saffron, Mint, Ghee, Garlic, Ginger, Salt
Cooking Steps: 1. Marinate chicken in yogurt, garam masala, garlic, ginger, salt (2+ hrs). 2. Fry onion in ghee until golden; set half aside. 3. Cook chicken with remaining onion until tender. 4. Parboil rice (70% cooked); drain. 5. Dissolve saffron in warm milk. 6. Layer: rice, chicken, mint, fried onion; repeat. 7. Drizzle saffron milk and ghee on top. 8. Cover tightly; cook on low heat 25 min (dum method). Serve.

Key Ingredients: Spinach, Paneer, Onion, Tomato, Garlic, Ginger, Garam masala, Cream, Cumin, Salt
Cooking Steps: 1. Blanch spinach (2 min); blend into smooth puree. 2. Fry cumin seeds in oil. 3. Add onion; cook until golden. 4. Add garlic and ginger; fry 2 min. 5. Add tomato; cook until soft. 6. Add spinach puree; simmer 5 min. 7. Add garam masala and cream; stir. 8. Add pan-fried paneer cubes; simmer 5 min. Season with salt. Serve with naan.

Key Ingredients: Flour, Potato, Green peas, Onion, Coriander seeds, Cumin, Chili powder, Salt, Oil, Water
Cooking Steps: 1. Make dough: mix flour, salt, oil, water; knead until smooth; rest 30 min. 2. Boil and mash potatoes. 3. Fry onion with cumin and coriander seeds. 4. Add mashed potato, peas, chili powder, salt; mix well. 5. Roll dough into circles; cut in half. 6. Form cones; fill with potato mixture; seal edges. 7. Deep-fry in medium-hot oil until golden (5-7 min). Serve with chutney.

Key Ingredients: Noodles, Scallion, Soy sauce, Dark soy sauce, Sugar, Vegetable oil, Salt
Cooking Steps: 1. Fry scallion slices in oil on medium-low heat until golden and crispy (15 min). 2. Remove scallions; reserve the fragrant oil. 3. Mix soy sauce, dark soy sauce, sugar in a bowl. 4. Cook noodles until al dente; drain. 5. Toss noodles immediately with scallion oil and sauce mixture. 6. Top with crispy scallions. Serve.

Key Ingredients: Sea bass, Ginger, Green onion, Soy sauce, Sesame oil, Cooking wine, Salt
Cooking Steps: 1. Score fish on both sides; season with salt and cooking wine. 2. Place ginger slices inside and on top of fish. 3. Steam over high heat for 8-10 min. 4. Discard liquid from plate. 5. Top with fresh shredded ginger and green onion. 6. Heat oil until smoking; pour over fish to wilt onion. 7. Drizzle with soy sauce and sesame oil. Serve immediately.

Key Ingredients: Pork, Flour, Pork gelatin, Soy sauce, Green onion, Ginger, Sesame, Yeast, Sugar, Salt
Cooking Steps: 1. Make dough: mix flour, yeast, sugar, water; knead; rest 1 hr. 2. Mix pork with soy sauce, ginger, green onion, salt. 3. Add diced pork gelatin to filling. 4. Divide dough into pieces; roll each into circle. 5. Fill and pleat buns closed. 6. Rest 20 min. 7. Fry buns in oiled pan (flat side down) until golden. 8. Add water; cover and steam 8 min. 9. Sprinkle sesame and green onion. Serve.
